name: revit_create_externally_tagged_brep
description: Creates an ExternallyTaggedBRep geometry, adds it to a DirectShape, and returns element and external ids.

external_geometry_id.description: Stable external id for the tagged BRep (default Podium id from sample)

notes: Wraps HelperMethods.ExecuteCreateBRepCommand; pair with update tool using same external id.
